title: Code Coffee, 17 Jan 2025
safe: Tet (Lunar New Year) is Vietnam's biggest holiday: family reunions, banh chung, li xi for luck, homes decorated with blossoms (the deck's own 'Did you know' slide)
CODE LEAP joined the AWS Partner Program in early 2025
Every Code Coffee includes a Team Sharing talk; past topics: prefix sums, vector databases, generating UI mockups with v0 (AI)
Code Coffee recognises an 'Outstanding Employee' each session
$500 referral bonus for select open engineering roles once the referred hire passes probation
hold_clients: JTL (new client: Cloud Journey, Kubernetes/.NET/React, with Coduct)

title: Code Coffee, 25 Jul 2025
safe: CODE LEAP members joined the first Saigon Vibecoders meetup (indie hackers; AI building: n8n scrapers, LoRA image training, Claude Code for UI test scripting)
Monthly birthday shout-outs and post-Code-Coffee treats (e.g. German chocolates)
Career Path Framework rolled out company-wide (Engineering, Product Delivery, Product Design, Quality Engineering; feeds Performance Reviews and growth tracking)
New custom Slack commands launched: /help, /resources, /vacay, /request-access, /slack-feedback
Bi-annual British Council English test: 56 team members tested in June 2025, proficiency rising
Collaboration Camp 2025 agile workshop on Sept 27 (register with Nhung)
people: (many named: birthdays, anniversaries, probation passes, leadership; roster-check before any use)
omit: team departures (named leavers on this deck)

title: Code Coffee, 28 Mar 2025 (held 4 Apr)
safe: Work-anniversary shout-outs are a Code Coffee staple ('1/2/3 years with CODE LEAP' slides, e.g. CTO Pierrick Libert hit 3 years)
CODE LEAP co-sponsored HSG Alumni Asia Weekend 2025 at its office (~100 participants); CEO gave a startup talk using CODE LEAP as a real example, a Tech Lead shared his career journey
The 'Duck' tradition: lock your computer when you step away or get 'ducked' on the team channel; light penalty fund goes to team treats
Company Photoshoot 2025; office expanded to a new 14th-floor space (move-in 10 Apr 2025)
International Women's Day celebrated
omit: named team departures on this deck

title: Code Coffee, 25 Apr 2025
safe: CODE LEAP's 4th Anniversary was celebrated in April 2025 (photo slides only; no activity text in the deck)
CEO Felix Suellwold reached 4 years with CODE LEAP in Apr 2025, corroborating a founding around April 2021 (the 5th anniversary fell on 11 Apr 2026)
CODE LEAP hosted the HCMC ServiceNow Developer Meetup Q2 2025 (~20 engineers; talks on Hardware Asset Management + Yokohama features; dinner and games with prizes)
14th-floor office fully operational since 14 Apr 2025 (2 meeting rooms)
Annual Health Check-up perk: full check-up with digital + hard-copy health report via the Jio App, plus free remote doctor consults for 1 year
Post-Code-Coffee treat: Roasted Purple Sticky Corn
